description: Determines the central mythology or origin story that defines a fantasy world.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the central mythology or origin story that defines a fantasy world.

entries.result: Creation: The Central Mythology is about how this fantasy world came into existence. This should be a tale of mighty magical forces or great divine powers

resultTranslations.en: Creation: The Central Mythology is about how this fantasy world came into existence. This should be a tale of mighty magical forces or great divine powers

entries.result: The Right to Rule: The dominant nation, species, or force maintains it has a right to rule through inherent properties. For instance, a kingdom of cruel sorcerers believe in their superiority over others

resultTranslations.en: The Right to Rule: The dominant nation, species, or force maintains it has a right to rule through inherent properties. For instance, a kingdom of cruel sorcerers believe in their superiority over others

entries.result: War: War has ravaged this world, shaping every aspect of life. War may currently be going on now, or it might be a distant memory. Either way, the impact of war runs deep

resultTranslations.en: War: War has ravaged this world, shaping every aspect of life. War may currently be going on now, or it might be a distant memory. Either way, the impact of war runs deep

entries.result: Doom: The Central Mythology is about how this world will end. For instance, the return of a banished powerful evil entity or a foretold disaster

resultTranslations.en: Doom: The Central Mythology is about how this world will end. For instance, the return of a banished powerful evil entity or a foretold disaster

entries.result: Return to Greatness: This world was once much more than it is now, and many believe it will return to greatness. Perhaps there's a legend about the return of a mythical king, or the desire for the overthrow of a despot

resultTranslations.en: Return to Greatness: This world was once much more than it is now, and many believe it will return to greatness. Perhaps there's a legend about the return of a mythical king, or the desire for the overthrow of a despot

entries.result: Way of Life: There is a particular way of life here that you can interpret from the Keywords. This way of life is steeped in history and tradition. For instance, people favor living on boats because they revere water, or magic is viewed as divine and those who wield it are honored

resultTranslations.en: Way of Life: There is a particular way of life here that you can interpret from the Keywords. This way of life is steeped in history and tradition. For instance, people favor living on boats because they revere water, or magic is viewed as divine and those who wield it are honored

entries.result: A New Era: There is a sense that the world is on the precipice of great change, breaking from its past into an uncertain but new future

resultTranslations.en: A New Era: There is a sense that the world is on the precipice of great change, breaking from its past into an uncertain but new future

entries.result: Hope: The Central Mythology is a message of hope. For instance, the people believe that the land will always provide, or that the balance between good and evil will be reset by the arrival of The One

resultTranslations.en: Hope: The Central Mythology is a message of hope. For instance, the people believe that the land will always provide, or that the balance between good and evil will be reset by the arrival of The One

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled to make your interpretation
